title: [Maelstrom Bay, Surface]
description: The green waters of Maelstrom Bay stretch out in all directions.  Swells roll in from the great western sea without interruption.  A sharp current prohibits movement to the west.  To the east, the mainland is marked by a sheer, rocky cliff.
paths: Obvious paths: north, northeast, east, southeast, northwest, down

wayto.11439: ;e if checkspell(112) then move 'east' else move 'swim east' end; waitrt?
wayto.11445: ;e if checkspell(112) then move 'northwest' else move 'swim northwest' end; waitrt?
wayto.11447: ;e if checkspell(112) then move 'southeast' else move 'swim southeast' end; waitrt?
wayto.11455: ;e if checkspell(112) then move 'northeast' else move 'swim northeast' end; waitrt?
wayto.16041: ;e if checkspell(112) then move 'north' else move 'swim north' end; waitrt?
